description: Seeded P4 fix-cycle violation (BLOCKER a, Codex second-opinion review): a corpus whose free-text `description` field carries synthetic PHI markers -- Patient Name: Jane Testcase, MRN: 1234567, DOB: 2015-03-14. This exact shape previously validated cleanly because `description` had only a maxLength cap, no content check. Must now be rejected fail-closed by the identifier-denylist procedural layer (lib/identifier-denylist.mjs), independent of the schema layer.
